footnotes.F1: Price reported is a weighted-average purchase price. The shares were purchased at prices ranging from $1.75 to $1.80. The reporting person will provide upon request to the SEC, the Issuer or security holder of the Issuer, full information regarding the number of shares purchased at each separate price.
footnotes.F2: Includes 3,000 shares purchased on May 20, 2021 inadvertently not reflected as held on the Reporting Person's prior Form 4 and 3,170 shares purchased on November 22, 2021, in each case pursuant to the Issuer's 2014 Employee Stock Purchase Plan, as amended and restated.
footnotes.F3: Price reported is a weighted-average purchase price. The shares were purchased at prices ranging from $1.845 to $1.85. The reporting person will provide upon request to the SEC, the Issuer or security holder of the Issuer, full information regarding the number of shares purchased at each separate price.
